payload.answer: Stored an article reference and associated design takeaways (from mock content) for knowledge graph memory design.

entity_resolution.reason: No stable internal entity identifiers were provided for linking; only the URL and general concepts were mentioned.

payload.intent: Store a user-provided article reference and its relevance for knowledge graph memory design.

memory_cards.statement: A referenced article (https://example.com/ai-memory) is useful for thinking about knowledge graph memory design; mock content suggests graph memory helps agents preserve relationships and that provenance and update semantics are needed.

details: Created one memory card capturing the article URL and relevance plus mock content themes (relationships, provenance, update semantics).

repair_options: If you provide the real article content (instead of mock fetched text), update the stored statements to match the actual claims with higher confidence.
Add explicit design requirements or principles (e.g., update model type, provenance granularity) if you want more actionable memory.
